title: Inky
description: This card deals [blue]2[/blue] additional damage and applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold].
notes: This enchantment adds 2 damage only for powered attacks (attacks that deal damage). The Weak power is applied to the target chosen when the card is played, or to all enemies if the card targets all enemies. Inky is applied by BladeOfInk, a rare Skill card that creates 2-3 Shivs (Attack cards) and enchants each with this enchantment.
